title: Goa Board SSC/ 10th Class 2025 Exam Time Table

detail.short_info: Goa Board of Secondary & Higher Education (GBSHSE) has released Exam Time Table for SSC/ 10th Class Exam 2025.

content.text: Name of the Post: Goa Board SSC/ 10th Class 2025 Exam Time Table Released
Brief Information: Goa Board of Secondary & Higher Education (GBSHSE) has released Exam Time Table for SSC/ 10th Class Exam 2025. Candidates can check their Exam Dates at below link...

items.label: Important Dates
items.text: Date of Theory Examination for 10th Class : 01-03-2025, 03 to 08-03-2025, 10 to 15-03-2025 & 17-03-2025 to 20-03-2025 Date of Practical Examination for (NSQF Subjects) : 04-02-2025 onwards Date of Practical Examination for (Science (General & CWSN) /Geography (CWSN) /History (CWSN) : 01-02-2025 onwards Date of Practical Examination for (CWSN special subjects) : 13-02-2025 onwards

seo_tags: Goa Board SSC/ 10th Class Exam Date 2025 - Exam Time Table Released
